default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aftershoot and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, calibration, and scaling of blog post production.](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content calibration ongoing: product-focused articles need refinement; lifestyle/general topics on track](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Scaling plan: aim for 10 articles/week (5 product-focused, 5 lifestyle) after current batch approval](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Traffic growing (57-58% QoQ), but signup conversion remains flat; focus on product content and CRO](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [New resources for quotes and images identified to enhance content quality and reduce bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration and Scaling

  - [Two articles from last week to be finalized with recent feedback](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Four new articles in progress, incorporating product-centric approach](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Plan to scale to 10 articles/week after approval of current batch](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Focus on refining product-related content (retouching, culling, editing)](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Continue producing lifestyle content while calibrating product-focused articles](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Shift article titles to question format for better engagement](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Adapt writing style to more descriptive, storytelling approach for photography audience](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Emphasize product positioning and workflow integration in content](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Balance between product-focused (mid/bottom funnel) and top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Traffic and Conversion Challenges

  - [Blog traffic grew 57-58% QoQ (Q4 2024 to Q1 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Signup conversion remains flat despite traffic increase](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Focus on improving content relevance and topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [New blog design in development to enhance CRO](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

### Content Enhancement Tactics

  - [Source expert quotes: 10+ email contacts provided by Monalisa](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Utilize YouTube video transcripts for quote extraction](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Leverage existing AfterShoot support documents for workflow descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Access to new image resources: before/after edits, "Straight Out of AfterShoot" page](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

### Collaboration and Feedback Loop

  - [Wait for all stakeholders' comments before making edits to avoid conflicting changes](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Nicolás introduced as calendar manager and content collaborator](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Team to review upcoming blog design for CRO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize and send two articles from last week for final approval](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Complete four new articles with product-centric focus by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Scale to 10 articles/week (5 product-focused, 5 lifestyle) upon approval](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [David to explore AfterShoot's YouTube content for quote sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Monalisa to share email contacts for expert quotes and additional image resources](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Team to review new blog design when shared by Rasheed/Monalisa](https://fathom.video/share/HuerRkW9j8x-RCxC4Y41yWbwgK3LjtdC?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

action_items.description: Finish 2 articles from last week, incorporate comments, send for final approval
Revise 4 new articles to focus more on product, AfterShoot workflows
Send ~10 email contacts for quotes and blog post pictures to David
Review AfterShoot YouTube videos, extract relevant quotes for articles
Share folder of before-after images for showcasing editing outputs
Prepare recommendations for 10 new articles (5-6 product-focused, 4-5 lifestyle)
